title: SpecGate Binding File
description: Schema for SpecGate binding files — declares language, build targets, and input/output wiring for the harness.

targets.description: Named execution targets referenced by spec files via the 'target' field.

target.description: An execution target — either a command to run or a function to call.

inputs.description: How spec inputs are delivered to the command.

outputs.description: How to read outputs after the command runs.

call.description: Fully qualified function path to invoke, e.g. 'specgate_core::validate'.

outputs.description: How to read outputs after the call returns. If omitted, outputs come from the return value.

inputMapping.description: Maps spec input names to delivery mechanisms. Each key is a spec input name.

inputDelivery.description: How a single input value is delivered to the command. Exactly one key specifies the mechanism.

file.description: File path to write the input value to. Supports {workdir} template.

arg.description: CLI flag name (e.g. '--threshold'). Value is appended after the flag.

outputMapping.description: How to read outputs after execution.

file.description: File path to read output from. The file contains JSON matching the spec's output types.

stdout.description: If true, parse stdout as JSON for outputs.

stderr.description: If true, parse stderr for error outputs.

exit_code.description: Spec output field name to map the process exit code to.
